value.found_quote: Codex can run subagent workflows by spawning specialized agents in parallel and then collecting their results in one response. ... Current Codex releases enable subagent workflows by default.
value.rationale: The official OpenAI Developers Codex docs page describes Codex subagents in detail, including spawning specialized agents in parallel, custom agents, and configuration. It states current Codex releases enable subagent workflows by default, indicating active availability (with IDE visibility "coming soon" and a CSV batch feature marked experimental).
